title: caragana × prestonae
intro: Caragana × prestonae, also known as the hybrid caragana or caragana prestonae, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Russia and Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Caragana × prestonae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Caragana × prestonae is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
